zh.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Turgis於1349年出生在英國多瑟特馬普德。她於1369年與Richard Turgis在英國英格蘭多瑟特馬普德結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1449年在英國英格蘭享年100歲。

nameMeanings.name: Turgis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Turgoose
meanings: English: relationship name from the Middle English personal name Turgis (Old Scandinavian Þorgils, Thorgisl). Compare Sturgess .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Turgis was born in 1349, in Mappowder, Dorset, England. She married Richard Turgis in 1369, in Mappowder, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1449, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 100.

fr.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Turgis est née en 1349, à Mappowder, Dorset, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Richard Turgis en 1369, à Mappowder, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1449, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 100 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Turgis wurde 1349 in Mappowder, Dorset, England geboren. Sie hat 1369 in Mappowder, Dorset, England, United Kingdom Richard Turgis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1449 im Alter von 100 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Turgis è nata il nel 1349 nel Mappowder, Dorset, England. Lei sposato Richard Turgis nel 1369, nel Mappowder, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1449, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 100 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Turgisは1349年にイギリスドールセトマップオウダーで生まれた。1369年にイギリスイギリスドールセトマップオウダーでRichard Turgisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1449年にイギリスイギリスで100歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Turgis(은)는 1349년 영국 도르세트 마포우더에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1369년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 마포우더에서 Richard Turgis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1449년 영국 잉글랜드에서 100세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Mrs Richard Turgis родилась в 1349 г. в местности маппоудир, дорсет, Англия. Она умерла в 1449 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 100 лет.
